---
title: "Week 17 --- Panel Data Analysis"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 17 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | Pooled OLS | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Fixed Effects | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Random Effects & Hausman Test | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
